ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2009 Continued To Dec-14-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert J. Perkiss, Esq. appeared for plaintiff State Bar of California, a Public Corporation.
No appearance by defendants Pamela J. Stevens, an individual or Nikolai Tehin, Jr., an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants on June 24, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 29, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, September 15, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff State Bar of California, a Public Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Pamela J. Stevens an individual and Nikolai Tehin, Jr. an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $785,907.16.
Prejudgment Interest - $325,555.20.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $0.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,111,462.36.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
